ticket.subject: Migrating existing JSON column to JSONB — RLS policy blocks service_role updates
ticket.body: We're converting a `metadata json` column to `metadata jsonb` on a 45M-row table using `alter column ... using metadata::jsonb`. The migration is failing partway through because our RLS policy enforces `(select auth.uid()) = owner_id`, but the schema migration runs under service_role. About 2% of rows are causing the process to abort. Would disabling the policy temporarily be the right move, or is there a better pattern for performing schema changes on RLS-protected tables without triggering policy violations?
